title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">✅</font> Exploratory writing is messy. The
content:
✅ Exploratory writing is messy. The goal is momentum, not perfection.
✅ Keep the conversation going. Let’s email and refine ideas together.

Would you like this formatted into a PDF workbook for easy reference?
context: From document: Writing Guide for Derek: Structure, Exploration, and Momentum — chunk 8 (chunk 8/8)
